name: The Center for the Arts
hook: Grass Valley's major arts venue gives visitors an immediate way to plan around performances, exhibitions, classes, and community events.
whyItMatters: MUSE repeatedly places The Center inside local arts news, culture itineraries, education, and event coverage, making it the clearest public gateway into Grass Valley's year-round arts life.
pathMembership: Living Like a Local; Evening Arts Night; performance-first path

museEvidence.claim: The Center is a recurring MUSE-linked anchor for Grass Valley performances, classes, culture itineraries, and local arts news.

image.alt: The Center for the Arts exterior in Grass Valley

name: Nevada Theatre
hook: A historic Nevada City theatre where live performance, local memory, and a downtown night out meet.
whyItMatters: MUSE connects Nevada Theatre to arts-essential storytelling, annual event listings, and culture itineraries, so the card can frame it as both a performance stop and a piece of Nevada City's civic memory.
pathMembership: Nevada City night-out path; historic theatre path

museEvidence.claim: Nevada Theatre has direct 2024-2025 MUSE support as a performance and events anchor.

name: North Star House
hook: A Julia Morgan-designed landmark where architecture, mining history, restoration, and civic imagination come into view.
whyItMatters: MUSE's 2026 Julia Morgan coverage gives North Star House a direct heritage-design thread, helping the map treat it as a living cultural landmark rather than a generic historic stop.
pathMembership: Historic Grass Valley; architecture/design path; civic heritage path

museEvidence.claim: North Star House has direct 2026 MUSE support through Julia Morgan heritage-design coverage.

image.alt: North Star House in Grass Valley

name: Empire Mine
hook: A historic landscape that grounds Grass Valley arts discovery in mining history, public memory, and place.
whyItMatters: MUSE directly includes Empire Mine in a GVNC culture itinerary, while 2026 heritage links help frame the broader landscape carefully: not as an arts venue, but as context for the region's identity.
pathMembership: Historic landscape path; Grass Valley orientation path

museEvidence.claim: Empire Mine has direct MUSE itinerary support as part of GVNC cultural exploration.
The 2026 MUSE evidence is thematic heritage support, not a direct Empire Mine article claim.

image.alt: Empire Mine State Historic Park in Grass Valley
image.credit: Jerrye and Roy Klotz MD, via Wikimedia Commons (CC BY-SA 3.0)

name: Art Works Gallery
hook: A downtown Grass Valley artist cooperative where visitors can browse local work and meet the maker side of the arts scene.
whyItMatters: MUSE's 2026 Art Works Gallery links support a card focused on local artists, gallery browsing, and community leadership rather than only large institutions or landmarks.
pathMembership: Grass Valley gallery walk; local makers path

museEvidence.claim: Art Works Gallery has direct 2026 MUSE support for local artist and community-leadership framing.

image.alt: Art Works Gallery interior with local artwork

name: The Curious Forge
hook: A community makerspace where classes, tools, studios, and shared projects make the creative ecosystem hands-on.
whyItMatters: The corpus does not provide a direct Curious Forge article link yet, so the card stays honest: MUSE supports the maker and arts-education themes around this anchor, while the place claim comes from the V1 record and official site.
pathMembership: Maker path; workshops/classes path; creative technology path

museEvidence.claim: Curious Forge has fuzzy MUSE support for maker and arts-education themes, not direct place evidence.
museEvidence.notes: Do not treat these clips as direct Curious Forge evidence.

image.alt: The Curious Forge in Nevada City

name: Nevada City Winery
hook: A downtown winery and gallery stop that can connect art viewing, local gathering, and an evening Nevada City path.
whyItMatters: Nevada City Winery gives the downtown path a walkable gathering point so culture can continue after gallery browsing or a performance.
supportingDescription: A downtown Nevada City tasting room and gallery stop that works best here as evening-route context, not as a primary cultural anchor.
visibleIncompleteLabel: Source image pending for this supporting stop.
pathMembership: Nevada City evening path; downtown gallery/wine path

name: ASiF Studios
hook: A hands-on studio and arts education space that shows the making side of Grass Valley's creative ecosystem.
whyItMatters: ASiF Studios helps the Makers / Working Artists path show art being taught, practiced, and shared inside a studio community.
supportingDescription: A Grass Valley studio community and teaching space that supports the working-artists path by showing the making side of the local arts ecosystem.
visibleIncompleteLabel: Candidate image shown; confirm final source image before public use.
pathMembership: Working artists path; classes/workshops path; makers path

name: Hirschman Trail / Hirschman's Pond
hook: A pond-and-trail stop that lets the map connect cultural discovery to walking, public space, and the landscape around Nevada City.
whyItMatters: Hirschman Trail / Hirschman's Pond helps the prototype connect cultural discovery to landscape, walking, and public space around Nevada City.
supportingDescription: A Nevada City trail and pond context stop included to show how paths can make room for outdoor pause, landscape memory, and movement between cultural places.
visibleIncompleteLabel: Candidate image shown; source description has been replaced with review-slice context pending cleanup.
pathMembership: Outdoor pause path; Nevada City walking path; cultural landscape path

name: North Columbia Schoolhouse Cultural Center
hook: A historic schoolhouse turned community cultural center that keeps the Ridge visible inside Nevada County's arts map.
whyItMatters: North Columbia Schoolhouse Cultural Center keeps Ridge and rural community culture visible without pulling the GVNC review slice into a countywide anchor set.
supportingDescription: A Ridge cultural center included as supporting route context so the map can gesture toward rural gathering and performance beyond the immediate downtown spine.
visibleIncompleteLabel: Source image pending for this supporting stop.
pathMembership: Ridge / rural culture path; community gathering path
